claim: target-native reference; not zero-shot, pooled training, adaptation, or paper reproduction
selection_boundary: official inter is evaluated once after inner-validation checkpoint selection

binary_broad.mapping: Normal vs every adventitious train/inter event

model.initialization: current author-hosted AST AudioSet runtime artifact
model.initialization_identity_boundary: current author runtime branch; not proof of historical 2023 serialized-byte identity

training.checkpoint_selection: maximum inner-validation ICBHI Score subject to the author sensitivity >5 eligibility gate; all 50 epochs run; no early stopping

known_task_differences: ICBHI respiratory cycles are replaced by SPRSound official event segments
SPRSound 8 kHz recordings are resampled to the source 16 kHz contract
binary and narrow-four heads are trained separately
Rhonchi and Stridor are included as abnormal for binary but excluded for narrow-four
author official-test-per-epoch selection is replaced by train-only patient-grouped validation
minority_warning: official inter has Both support approximately one; do not make a minority-performance claim

comparison_preregistration.primary_evidence: paired C0 minus B0 gap on identical SPRSound inter event IDs
comparison_preregistration.uncertainty: patient-grouped paired nonparametric bootstrap; fixed seed 20260722; 5000 replicates; percentile 95% interval
comparison_preregistration.patient_id_reliability: first filename element is patient number per official SPRSound README
comparison_preregistration.effect_reporting: absolute percentage-point gap for Score/UAR and raw absolute gap for F1
comparison_preregistration.practical_materiality_reference: >=5 percentage-point absolute gap; project reference only, not a community standard or significance threshold
comparison_preregistration.forbidden_evidence: Both recall and its contribution to narrow-four UAR cannot support a claim because inter Both support is one
comparison_preregistration.selection_boundary: bootstrap intervals and chance references are evaluation-only and cannot select checkpoints, thresholds, preprocessing, rows, mappings, or models
